title: Oil Steadies After First Drop This Week on Peace Talk Optimism
title_cn: 由于和平谈判乐观情绪，油价本周首次下跌后企稳
summary: Oil was steady after its first decline this week on optimism that ceasefire talks between the US and Iran will see energy flows resume through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Mythos AI Model Finds Hundreds of Vulnerabilities in Firefox
title_cn: Mythos AI 模型在 Firefox 中发现数百个漏洞
summary: Raffi Krikorian, chief technology officer at Mozilla, said that it's important identify and start to close a bunch of critical vulnerabilities to mitigate risks as AI dependence builds up. Krikorian said that a major consideration is making sure models are on your side and consumers are not living in 'someone else's intelligence.' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-Iran Talks Progress Stalls After Hezbollah Rejects Truce
title_cn: 真主党拒绝停战后，美伊谈判进展陷入停滞
summary: There was no sign of progress in ceasefire talks between the US and Iran after the worst burst of violence in weeks and as the Tehran-backed Hezbollah militia rejected on Thursday a US-brokered truce in Lebanon.

title: AI, Xerox Debt and Canada’s ‘Lost Status’ at Sohn Montreal
title_cn: 人工智能、施乐债务和加拿大在 Sohn 蒙特利尔的“失去地位”
summary: Hedge fund managers and other investors are gathered at a conference in Montreal to pitch the next big thing, and everything from artificial intelligence, biotech and gold mining was on the table Thursday.

title: Chip Stock Slump Rekindles Wall Street’s Buy-the-Dip Habit
title_cn: 芯片股暴跌重燃华尔街逢低买入的习惯
summary: As chipmakers suffered their worst day in more than two weeks, there were signs that some traders are betting the selloff will be short-lived.

title: Dow Average Hits Peak as Old-School Stocks Beat AI: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 老派股票击败人工智能，道琼斯指数触及峰值：市场结束
summary: Wall Street drove a rotation out of chipmakers into several other industries that tend to benefit from a resilient economy after Broadcom Inc.’s underwhelming outlook tested the artificial-intelligence trade.

title: Private Credit Deterioration Slow, Contained: Robson
title_cn: 私人信贷恶化缓慢且得到遏制：罗布森
summary: Meghan Robson, head of US credit strategy at BNP Paribas, and Sonali Pier, portfolio manager: multi-sector credit at PIMCO, join Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Cliffwater, Blackstone, and Partners Group all capped certain fund redemptions this week. The moves put private markets back into the spotlight. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sunshine Silver Mining Rises 27% After $270 Million US IPO
title_cn: 阳光银矿 (Sunshine Silver Mining) 在美国 IPO 融资 2.7 亿美元后股价上涨 27%
summary: Sunshine Silver Mining & Refining Co. shares rose 27% in their trading debut after the mine owner raised $270 million in an upsized US initial public offering.

title: Quantinuum Shares Pare Gains to Close Little Changed After IPO
title_cn: IPO后Quantinuum股价收盘涨幅几乎没有变化
summary: Quantinuum Inc., a quantum computing company backed by Honeywell International Inc., reversed a 19% gain to close just above its debut price after raising $1.68 billion in an upsized US initial public offering.

title: Saylor’s Bitcoin Machine Is Misfiring on Every Cylinder
title_cn: 塞勒的比特币机器每个气缸都失火了
summary: Michael Saylor built Strategy Inc. around a straightforward idea: raise money to buy Bitcoin, then never sell it. Over time, that simple bet has turned far more complicated.

title: Hatch Launches a Clock to Wirelessly Monitor Your Sleep
title_cn: Hatch 推出一款时钟来无线监测您的睡眠
summary: Hatch known for devices that help babies sleep, is getting into sleep-tracking for adults with a new bedside tracker called the Hatch Sleep Clock.  Ann Crady Weiss, CEO, of Hatch joins to discuss the importance of sleep health.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nasdaq 100 Declines, Dow Jones Hits Record as AI Trade Falters
title_cn: 人工智能交易步履蹒跚，纳斯达克 100 指数下跌，道琼斯指数创历史新高
summary: Investors ditched technology stocks in favor of the so-called “old economy” on Thursday as Broadcom Inc.’s earnings report pumped the brakes on the artificial-intelligence rally.

title: Power Equipment Firm Innio Rises 23% After $2.43 Billion IPO
title_cn: 电力设备公司 Innio 在 24.3 亿美元 IPO 后股价上涨 23%
summary: Shares of Innio Holding GmbH gained 23% after the gas engine maker’s biggest shareholders raised $2.43 billion in an initial public offering.

title: Princeton Endowment Backs Out of Oil and Gas Divestment Vow
title_cn: 普林斯顿捐赠基金退出石油和天然气撤资誓言
summary: Bloomberg's Janet Lorin joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Princeton University’s endowment is backtracking on its pledge to divest from publicly traded oil and gas companies, four years after it said it would exit such holdings as way to move toward a net-zero portfolio. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Israel Won't Have A Say In How The Iran War Ends, Aaron David Miller Says
title_cn: 亚伦·大卫·米勒表示，以色列不会对伊朗战争如何结束拥有发言权
summary: Aaron David Miller, a senior fellow at the Carnegie Endowment for International Peace, joined Balance of Power to discuss the latest developments in the Iran War. He said he thinks Israel is not going to have much say in how the Iran war ends. Miller also talks about President Trump's relationship with Israel. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Dips After Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Even as Clashes Persist
title_cn: 以色列-黎巴嫩停火后，尽管冲突持续，油价仍下跌
summary: Oil declined on hopes that the US and Iran are inching closer to a peace deal after a conditional ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon, even as the truce was marred by ongoing clashes.

title: This Jobs Report Will Not Help the Fed, Says JPM's Berro
title_cn: 摩根大通的贝罗表示，这份就业报告对美联储没有帮助
summary: Kelsey Berro, fixed income portfolio manager at JPMorgan Asset Management, joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." She says the May monthly jobs report won't help the Federal Reserve because it's still so concerned about the inflation outlook. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Strategic Petroleum Reserve Nears a 3-Year Low
title_cn: 美国战略石油储备接近三年低点
summary: The US buffer for crude oil is shrinking fast as the Iran war drags on. The country’s emergency petroleum stockpile, known as the Strategic Petroleum Reserve, has shrunk to levels last seen in mid-2023, after the Biden administration decided to withdraw SPR crude barrels to mitigate the oil-price impact of the Russia-Ukraine war. The global oil supply chain is becoming more vulnerable with each passing day the Strait of Hormuz remains closed.  Ellen Wald, President of Transversal Consulting joins to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasuries Rise as Oil Signals Optimism on Iran Peace Accord
title_cn: 石油信号显示对伊朗和平协议持乐观态度，国债上涨
summary: Treasuries rose and the dollar slipped as investors drew optimism about the prospects for a US-Iran peace deal from a conditional ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon, despite ongoing clashes.

title: Education Department Pushes Faster College Mergers
title_cn: 教育部推动加快大学合并
summary: The US Education Department says hundreds of colleges face financial distress and many won't survive the decade. Under Secretary Nicholas Kent join Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why the administration wants to speed up college mergers, defend private capital's role in higher education, and use AI-driven efficiencies to help lower costs for students and families. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Foreign Buyers Snap Up Turkish Stocks in Fast-Track Deals
title_cn: 外国买家通过快速交易抢购土耳其股票
summary: Foreign investors are piling into fast-tracked sales of shares in Turkish companies, seeing pockets of value in a market facing political turmoil at home and fallout from the Iran war.

title: What to Expect From the Monthly Jobs Report
title_cn: 从月度就业报告中可以期待什么
summary: Bloomberg Economics chief US economist Anna Wong joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." The team expects the May payrolls report to show a solid increase, suggesting the hot March and April reports reflected underlying momentum rather than just a rebound from earlier weakness.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Advances as Traders Weigh Fragile Israel-Lebanon Truce
title_cn: 交易商权衡脆弱的以色列-黎巴嫩停战协议，金价上涨
summary: Gold advanced after Israel and Lebanon agreed to a conditional ceasefire, a possible step toward resolving the wider Middle East conflict that’s upended global energy markets and raised inflation risks.

title: Illinois Passes $56B Budget as Bears Deal Stalled
title_cn: 由于熊市交易陷入停滞，伊利诺伊州通过了 56B 美元的预算
summary: Bloomberg's Shruti Singh joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Illinois legislators early Monday morning passed a nearly $56 billion budget for the fiscal year starting July 1, aiming to ease higher health-care and housing costs while bracing for potential federal funding cuts. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Broadcom Results Weigh Down Chip Sector | The Close 6/4/2026
title_cn: 博通业绩拖累芯片行业|收盘价 2026 年 6 月 4 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Glenmede Chief of Investment, Strategy, and Research Jason Pride, Space Capital Founder & CEO Chad Anderson, World Labs Co-Founder & CEO Fei-Fei Li, SW Retail Advisors Founder & President Stacey Widlitz, SPG Global Managing Director Simon Gallagher, Goldman Sachs’ Asad Haider, Lazard Asset Management CIO Eric Van Nostrand, Coresight Research Founder & CEO Deborah Weinswig, The Conference Board Senior US Economist Yelena Shulyatyeva, Quantinuum CEO Raj Hazra, Ciena CEO Gary Smith, & Nike Global Football VP & GM Camilo Andrade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CME’s Duffy Voices ‘Grave Concerns’ With New Perps Contracts
title_cn: CME 的 Duffy 对新的 Perps 合同表示“严重担忧”
summary: Terry Duffy, the chief executive officer of CME Group Inc., said he is “very concerned” about the rise of so-called perpetual futures, an increasingly popular kind of financial contract that recently won key US regulatory approval.

title: AI Scientist Bengio: Building Systems We Don't Know How to Control
title_cn: AI 科学家 Bengio：构建我们不知道如何控制的系统
summary: Yoshua Bengio, Founder & Scientific Advisor at Mila Quebec AI Institute and Co-President & Scientific Director at LawZero discusses AI safety, agent risks and governance frameworks. He warns that right now we don't have complete control of AI agents right now.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Planet Labs Raises Outlook as War Drives Earth-Imaging Demand
title_cn: 战争推动地球成像需求，Planet Labs 提高前景
summary: Planet Labs raised its full-year guidance after reporting record quarterly sales fueled by demand from defense and government customers for its satellite imaging services.

title: Emerging-Market Stocks Sink as Broadcom Miss Revives AI Concerns
title_cn: 博通小姐重燃人工智能担忧，新兴市场股市下跌
summary: Emerging-market equities notched their worst day in roughly three weeks as Asian technology heavyweights retreated after a disappointing outlook from Broadcom Inc. raised concerns about the scale of the artificial-intelligence rally.

title: Bitcoin Has Longest Losing Streak Since August in Bruising Week
title_cn: 比特币在惨痛的一周中出现自八月以来最长的连续下跌
summary: Bitcoin posted its longest losing streak since August, weighed down by liquidations of bullish bets and this week’s rare sale of tokens by the dominant corporate buyer.

title: IBM, AT&T Accused by Whistleblower of Covering Up Foreign Hacks
title_cn: IBM、AT&T 被举报人指控掩盖外国黑客行为
summary: International Business Machines Corp. and AT&T Inc.’s computer systems were repeatedly breached by foreign hackers, and the companies concealed those intrusions from the US government in violation of the law, according to a lawsuit from a former IBM cybersecurity official.

title: Verizon CEO Sees AI Coming for Customer Service Jobs
title_cn: Verizon 首席执行官认为人工智能将取代客户服务工作
summary: Verizon CEO Daniel Schulman says AI could replace “a large percentage” of the company's customer service workforce. Speaking at the Bloomberg Tech Conference 2026 in San Francisco, Schulman also says that the technology is primed to handle routine customer requests like billing amounts and increases customer satisfaction when used but AI agents will also have to work together with human agents to satisfy many requests. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Verizon CEO Sees AI Replacing Large Share of Customer Service
title_cn: Verizon 首席执行官认为人工智能将取代大部分客户服务
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. Chief Executive Officer Dan Schulman expects that artificial intelligence technology will replace “a large percentage” of the work that customer service representatives do as the New York-based carrier looks to boost financial performance and improve customer satisfaction.

title: Android's Samat on Integrating AI into the Ecosystem
title_cn: Android 的 Samat 将人工智能集成到生态系统中
summary: Sameer Samat, President of Android Ecosystem at Google discusses platform evolution, AI integration and ecosystem strategy with Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman in a live version of Power On at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: HPE Sponsor Spotlight
title_cn: HPE 赞助商聚焦
summary: David Hughes, Senior Vice President of SASE & Security, Networking at HPE speaks with Bloomberg’s Kate Moriarty about enterprise technology and infrastructure strategy at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bruce Springsteen’s Anti-Trump Message Isn’t Hurting Business
title_cn: 布鲁斯·斯普林斯汀的反特朗普信息不会损害商业
summary: The New Jersey legend crossed the US on an anti-Trump tour and released a protest song. His fans keep buying tickets and listening.

title: LS Power Said to Near Deal for EDF’s American Renewables Arm
title_cn: LS Power 据称即将收购 EDF 的美国可再生能源部门
summary: LS Power LLC is in advanced talks to buy Electricite de France SA’s North American renewable power business amid rising energy demand to supply data centers, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Ciena CEO Rejects Dot-Com Bubble Comparisons
title_cn: Ciena 首席执行官拒绝将互联网泡沫进行比较
summary: Ciena CEO Gary Smith joins Bloomberg Open Interest to discuss why AI networking demand is accelerating and why the AI infrastructure boom is fundamentally different from the dot-com bubble. He also outlines where enterprise AI adoption could unlock the next phase of growth. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic President Sees High Computing Costs as Driver for IPOs
title_cn: Anthropic 总裁将高计算成本视为 IPO 的驱动力
summary: Anthropic PBC co-founder and President Daniela Amodei said the high cost of developing artificial intelligence models is driving firms like hers to look to the public market for capital, days after the Claude maker confidentially filed paperwork for an IPO.

title: Verizon CEO on Using Tech to Transform Telecom
title_cn: Verizon 首席执行官谈利用技术改造电信
summary: Dan Schulman, CEO at Verizon discusses AI-led transformation, customer growth and operational strategy with Bloomberg’s Tom Giles at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky Plans to Start a New AI Company
title_cn: Airbnb 首席执行官布莱恩·切斯基 (Brian Chesky) 计划创办一家新的人工智能公司
summary: Airbnb Inc. Chief Executive Officer Brian Chesky is starting a new artificial intelligence lab, according to several people familiar with the matter, marking his first foray into the global AI race.

title: Broadcom Sinks After Disappointing AI Chip Outlook
title_cn: 博通在人工智能芯片前景令人失望后陷入困境
summary: Broadcom shares fall in biggest drop since January 2025, after the chipmaker gave an outlook that was seen as underwhelming given the industry’s AI-related demand. Bloomberg's Mandeep Singh joined to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Power Boom Revives Natural Gas as Infrastructure Bet
title_cn: 人工智能发电热潮重振天然气作为基础设施的赌注
summary: A surge in electricity demand from artificial intelligence and data centers is reshaping North America’s power markets, creating a “renaissance” for natural gas after decades of limited new development, according to KKR & Co. partner Brandon Freiman.

title: AI Scientist Bengio on Engineering Safer Agents
title_cn: 人工智能科学家 Bengio 谈工程更安全的代理
summary: Yoshua Bengio, Founder & Scientific Advisor at Mila Quebec AI Institute and Co-President & Scientific Director at LawZero discusses AI safety, agent risks and governance frameworks with Bloomberg’s Shirin Ghaffary at Bloomberg Tech 2026 in San Francisco. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Weighs Need For Rate Hikes, US May Payrolls Due Out Friday | Real Yield 6/4/2026
title_cn: 美联储考虑加息的必要性，美国五月就业报告将于周五公布实际收益率 6/4/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: JPMorgan Asset Management Fixed Income Portfolio Manager Kelsey Berro, Federated Hermes Executive VP Deborah Cunningham, Man Group Co-Head of US Private Credit Jason Dillow, BNPs Paribas Head of US Credit Strategy Meghan Robson, and Pimco Portfolio Manager: Multi-Sector Credit Sonali Pier. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Shark Tank Star Shrinks Data Center Footprint After Backlash
title_cn: 鲨鱼坦克之星在强烈反对后缩小了数据中心的占地面积
summary: A proposed Utah data center that would have been almost three times the size of Manhattan will be drastically scaled back after pressure from lawmakers.

title: Hatch’s New Bedside Sleep Clock Wirelessly Tracks Sleep Quality
title_cn: Hatch 的新型床边睡眠时钟可无线跟踪睡眠质量
summary: Hatch Baby Inc., known for devices that help babies sleep, is getting into sleep-tracking for adults with a new bedside tracker called the Hatch Sleep Clock.

title: Jane Street Plans New Data Center as Computing Power Runs Scarce
title_cn: 由于计算能力匮乏，Jane Street 计划新建数据中心
summary: Jane Street Group plans to build and finance its own data center as the trading giant scales its operations to keep up with the demand for computing power.

title: Trump Says He Will Headline Rally Marking US’s 250th Anniversary
title_cn: 特朗普称他将主持纪念美国成立 250 周年的集会
summary: President Donald Trump said he would headline a rally in Washington on June 24th to mark the 250th anniversary of the US, a week after several artists pulled out of planned shows on the National Mall.

title: Private Jet Club Owner Guilty of $15 Million Charter Flight Scam
title_cn: 私人飞机俱乐部老板犯有价值 1500 万美元的包机诈骗罪
summary: A Maryland man who ran a company offering charter flights on private jets was convicted of defrauding customers out of $15 million, according to the US Department of Justice.

title: Trump Says Pulte Will Only Be Temporary Intelligence Director (Q&A)
title_cn: 特朗普表示普尔特只会担任临时情报总监（问答）
summary:
President Donald Trump said that Bill Pulte will only serve as national intelligence director on an acting basis, adding that he is interviewing permanent candidates for the position. 
“He’s not going to be permanent, because, you know, I don’t think he’d want to be permanent,” Trump told reporters Thursday of Pulte, a loyalist who currently serves as the nation’s housing finance chief.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Races to Contain Deadly Screwworm Threat to Cattle Supply
title_cn: 美国竞相遏制对牛供应的致命螺旋虫威胁
summary: The US Department of Agriculture is racing to contain the deadly New World screwworm after a case was detected in Texas, where a broader outbreak could threaten an already-small domestic cattle herd.

title: Burnham Confirms He’ll Challenge Starmer for UK Premiership
title_cn: 伯纳姆确认他将挑战斯塔默争夺英国英超冠军
summary: Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham confirmed for the first time his intention to challenge Keir Starmer to be Britain’s prime minister, drawing immediate criticism from the premier who vowed not to walk away from the job.

title: US Sanctions Cuba’s Díaz-Canel as Trump Ramps Up Pressure
title_cn: 特朗普加大压力，美国制裁古巴迪亚斯-卡内尔
summary: The US sanctioned Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel and members of his family, further ratcheting up pressure on the communist-run Caribbean island.

title: Ukraine’s Zelenskyy Proposes Peace Talks in Letter to Putin
title_cn: 乌克兰泽伦斯基在给普京的信中提议进行和平谈判
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy proposed peace talks to Russian leader Vladimir Putin in a rare and combative open letter on Thursday, as efforts to end more than four years of war gained momentum.

title: The Most Expensive World Cup Ever
title_cn: 有史以来最昂贵的世界杯
summary: FIFA will make billions of dollars from this year’s World Cup, but dynamic ticket pricing and mounting costs are leaving ordinary fans priced out, and host cities under financial strain. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Pulte's Intelligence Position Will Be Temporary
title_cn: 特朗普表示普尔特的情报职位将是临时的
summary: President Donald Trump says that Bill Pulte will only serve as national intelligence director on an acting basis during remarks to reporters at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Slams California’s Slow Results as Vote Count Drags On
title_cn: 特朗普猛烈抨击加州计票进展缓慢
summary: President Donald Trump accused California Democrats of “big cheating” in the state’s as the vote count continues — drawing a rebuke from Democratic Governor Gavin Newsom and other officials who have warned all along that the results would take time.

title: Trump Looks to Jobs Report to Calm Americans’ Economic Fears
title_cn: 特朗普希望就业报告能够平息美国人的经济担忧
summary: The labor market is relatively stable, but Americans still feel economic pressures.

title: Trump Says Pulte Will Only Be Temporary Intelligence Director
title_cn: 特朗普表示普尔特只会担任临时情报总监
summary: President Donald Trump said that Bill Pulte will only serve as national intelligence director on an acting basis, adding that he is interviewing permanent candidates for the position.

title: Trump Jr. Tells Investors He Would Avoid Investing in China
title_cn: 小特朗普告诉投资者他将避免投资中国
summary: President Donald Trump’s eldest son warned against investing in China during an event for investors on Thursday in Zurich, even as his father’s administration has pushed forward on plans to improve commercial ties between the two countries.

title: Senate Rejects Bids to Kill DOJ Fund | Balance of Power 6/4/2026
title_cn: 参议院拒绝终止司法部基金的提议权力平衡 2026 年 6 月 4 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest news from the Trump Administration. On today's show, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Hicks Evaluation Group Founder and CEO Fredrick Hicks and Carnegie Endowment for International Peace Senior Fellow Aaron David Miller. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Approves $700 Million in Bid to Revive US Coal Industry
title_cn: 特朗普批准7亿美元重振美国煤炭工业的报价
summary: President Donald Trump said he would marshal hundreds of millions of US taxpayer dollars behind his bid to revitalize the coal industry in America, steering funds to build new power plants, sustain existing operations and construct an export terminal in California.

title: Chile’s Top Lawmaker Says Debt Hike to Pass at Cost to Prestige
title_cn: 智利最高立法者称债务上调将以牺牲声誉为代价
summary: Chile’s new government is risking the nation’s hard-won reputation for fiscal prudence by seeking permission to sell billions of dollars in extra debt this year, the lower house speaker said.

title: DOJ Investigates 15 Medical Schools for Alleged Discrimination
title_cn: DOJ 调查 15 所医学院涉嫌歧视
summary: The Department of Justice launched investigations into 15 more medical schools over alleged racial discrimination in admissions, following up on previous actions against similar programs at the Ohio State University and Stanford University.

title: Putin Rebuffs Europe on Ukraine Talks, Says He Wants Trump Deal
title_cn: 普京拒绝欧洲就乌克兰谈判表示希望特朗普达成协议
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin pushed back at prospects for European leaders to help negotiate an end to his war in Ukraine, dismissing them as mediators and pointedly insisting on a peace deal he said had been worked out with Donald Trump in Alaska.

title: Bessent Says US Could Do Country-Specific Waiver for Russian Oil
title_cn: 贝森特称美国可以对俄罗斯石油实行特定国家的豁免
summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said future waivers allowing countries to purchase oil from Russia could be granted on a country-by-country basis rather than across the board.

title: Blue Origin Still in Running for Top Satellite Launches, US Says
title_cn: 美国称蓝色起源仍在争夺顶级卫星发射机会
summary: Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin LLC remains eligible to be certified for bidding against Elon Musk’s SpaceX for lucrative US military space launches after last week’s launchpad explosion, the Space Force’s acquisition branch said.

title: Supreme Court Bolsters SEC’s Power to Recoup Illegal Gains
title_cn: 最高法院增强 SEC 追回非法收益的权力
summary: The US Supreme Court reinforced the Securities and Exchange Commission’s power to recover illegal profits in a case that centered on one of the agency’s most potent enforcement tools.

title: US Judge Warns DOJ Appeal Could Upend Trump Tariff Refunds
title_cn: 美国法官警告司法部上诉可能会颠覆特朗普关税退款
summary: A US trade judge took the unusual step of personally responding to the Trump administration’s appeal of his order to refund $166 billion in tariffs the Supreme Court declared unlawful, calling the government’s filings “colorful” and questioning its legal stance.

title: Colombia’s Cepeda Joins Petro in Dropping Constitution Rewrite
title_cn: 哥伦比亚 Cepeda 与 Petro 一起放弃宪法重写
summary: Presidential candidate Iván Cepeda praised a decision to halt efforts to convene a constituent assembly to rewrite Colombia’s constitution, joining President Gustavo Petro in backing away from the unpopular proposal as the left seeks to win over centrist voters ahead of this month’s election runoff.

title: Kalshi, Polymarket to Be Targeted in House GOP Stock Ban
title_cn: Kalshi 和 Polymarket 将成为众议院共和党股票禁令的目标
summary: The House Administration Committee’s top Republican is working to add restrictions on lawmakers using prediction markets to the panel’s signature stock ban bill and pass it this summer.

title: AMLO Breaks Silence to Back Sheinbaum Amid Tensions With US
title_cn: 在与美国关系紧张之际，奥夫拉多尔打破沉默支持希恩鲍姆
summary: Mexico’s former President Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador, who repeatedly pledged to stay out of politics after leaving office, issued a public statement backing President Claudia Sheinbaum and criticizing growing US pressure on her government.

title: Trump Says He Plans to Nominate Blanche for Attorney General
title_cn: 特朗普表示他计划提名布兰奇担任司法部长
summary: President Donald Trump announced that he planned to soon make Todd Blanche, who leads the Justice Department on an acting basis, the “permanent attorney general,” a move that would install a fervent loyalist at the top of the nation’s law enforcement apparatus.

title: Rep. Doggett Accuses Bessent of 'Deception' Over Trump Audit
title_cn: 众议员多格特指责贝森特在特朗普审计中“欺骗”
summary: US Representative Lloyd Doggett grills Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent for not auditing President Donald Trump's finances during testimony before the House Ways and Means Committee. (Source: Bloomberg)
